description: An UNSENT, structurally-ADVISORY Public Fund grant proposal drafted by tanemaki 種蒔き (per ADR-2606122001) feeding the GrantGovernor propose() lane (ADR-2605192145). The record binds nothing: `advisory` MUST be true, `bindsFund` MUST be false, and the decision authority is ALWAYS 1 SBT = 1 vote behind the timelock — tanemaki holds no key and no vote weight (no-server-key, ADR-2605231525). The instrument set is GIVE-ONLY (grant / milestone-escrow / in-kind): equity, debt, convertible, revenue-share, carry and every investment-return shape are structurally unrepresentable (G2, mirrors fuchi ADR-2606052300 G1) — the Public Fund gives, it never invests. tanemaki REFUSES to draft a proposal for a screen-conflicting or under-evidenced org (G1/G5); created `drafted-unsent`, on-chain submission is a G7-gated member/operator step.

orgSynthetic.description: true = a FICTIONAL seed org (G6). Submitting a proposal for a real org requires the G7 gate.

ddFit.description: The advisory rubric fit at draft time (decimal string).

milestones.description: For milestone-escrow: the attestation-gated milestone ids (`ms.*`). Each tranche unlocks on Council Lv6+ attestation of the published evidence (ADR-2605192145 §4).

proposerDid.description: DID of the member/operator who will submit (the on-chain proposer — anyone may propose per ADR-2605192145). tanemaki itself never submits.

advisory.description: MUST be true. tanemaki evaluates and drafts; it never decides (G1).

status.description: Lifecycle. Created `drafted-unsent`; `submitted` and beyond are G7-gated member/operator steps on the GrantGovernor.

bindsFund.description: MUST be false. Only the 1-SBT-1-vote outcome + timelock moves funds; this record binds nothing (G1, no-server-key).

instrument.description: GIVE-ONLY disbursement rail (G2). Investment instruments do not exist in this vocabulary.

amountUsdcMicros.description: Proposed disbursement in USDC micro-units (0 for in-kind). Disbursed ONLY by the Public Fund Safe after the vote + timelock — never by tanemaki.

scorecardCid.description: IPFS CIDv1 (raw/sha2-256) of the public DD scorecard the voters see — the advisory basis of the proposal, content-verifiable (G4).

orgId.description: The candidate org this proposal would fund (tanemaki `org.*` id; live legs carry the resolvable entity id).

justification.description: Free-text rationale. Scanned: investment-return language (equity/出資/配当/ROI/exit/…) is rejected at draft time (G2).
